info.name: MindFuel AI API
info.description: Complete API collection for MindFuel AI platform. This collection includes all endpoints for authentication, user management, workbooks, AI chat, goals, journals, products, orders, and admin operations.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Endpoints for user authentication including registration, login, token refresh, logout, and password reset functionality. These endpoints handle user identity verification and session management.

request.description: Register a new user account. Creates a user profile and returns authentication tokens. Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
Authenticate user credentials and receive access and refresh tokens. The access token is automatically saved to collection variables for use in subsequent requests.
Obtain a new access token using the refresh token. Use this when the access token expires (typically after 15 minutes) to maintain user session without re-authentication.
Invalidate the current user session and remove authentication tokens. This ensures secure session termination.
Initiate password reset flow. Sends a password reset token to the user's registered email address.
Complete password reset using the token received via email. Sets a new password for the user account.

item.name: User Profile
item.description: Endpoints for managing user profile information and viewing user-specific data like workbooks. Requires authentication.

request.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information including name, email, role, subscription status, and preferences.
Update user profile information including name, bio, avatar, and preferences. Only provided fields will be updated.
Retrieve all workbooks associated with the authenticated user, including their progress and completion status.

item.name: Workbooks
item.description: Endpoints for managing spiritual workbooks, chapters, and sections. Admins can create and manage content, while users can view and track their progress.

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of workbooks. Can be filtered by category, difficulty level, or search term. Returns workbook metadata and user progress if authenticated.
Get detailed information about a specific workbook including its description, chapters, duration, and user-specific progress data.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "The Power of Meditation",
  "description": "A comprehensive guide to developing a daily meditation practice",
  "category": "meditation",
  "difficulty": "beginner",
  "duration": 30,
  "coverImage": "https://example.com/meditation-cover.jpg",
  "isPremium": false,
  "isPublished": true
}

request.description: Create a new workbook. Requires admin role. The workbook can be set as premium (requiring subscription) or free, and published or draft.
Update an existing workbook's metadata. Requires admin role. Can update any field including publication status.
Permanently delete a workbook and all associated chapters and sections. Requires admin role. This action cannot be undone.
Retrieve all chapters for a specific workbook in order. Includes chapter metadata and user completion status.
Create a new chapter within a workbook. Requires admin role. Chapters are ordered sequentially.
Get all sections within a specific chapter. Sections contain the actual content (text, exercises, meditations).

body.raw:
{
  "title": "The Breath as Anchor",
  "content": "Focus your attention on the natural rhythm of your breathing...",
  "type": "lesson",
  "order": 1,
  "duration": 5
}

request.description: Create a new section within a chapter. Requires admin role. Section types include lesson, exercise, meditation, and reflection.

item.name: AI Chat
item.description: Endpoints for AI-powered spiritual guidance chat. Users can create conversations, send messages, and receive AI responses. Admins can manage prompt templates and model configurations.

request.description: Retrieve all AI conversations for the authenticated user. Returns conversation metadata including title, creation date, and last message.
Get a specific conversation including all messages. Messages include both user queries and AI responses with context.
Start a new AI conversation. Optionally provide initial context to guide the conversation. The AI uses RAG to provide context-aware responses from workbook content.
Send a message in an AI conversation. The AI will respond with guidance, using RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) to reference relevant content from workbooks when useRag is true.
Delete a conversation and all its messages. This action cannot be undone.
Retrieve all AI prompt templates. Prompts define how the AI behaves and responds. Admin only.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Meditation Guide",
  "category": "guidance",
  "template": "You are a compassionate meditation teacher. Guide users with patience and wisdom...",
  "variables": ["user_name", "context"],
  "isActive": true
}

request.description: Create a new prompt template for AI conversations. Templates can include variables that are dynamically replaced. Admin only.
Update an existing prompt template. Can modify template text, variables, or activation status. Admin only.
Delete a prompt template. Admin only.
Get AI model configurations including model name, parameters, and usage settings. Admin only.
Configure a new AI model for use in conversations. Set model parameters like temperature and token limits. Admin only.
Update model configuration parameters. Admin only.
Get AI usage statistics including token consumption, conversation counts, and costs. Useful for monitoring and budgeting. Admin only.

item.name: Goals
item.description: Endpoints for personal goal setting and progress tracking. Users can create spiritual and personal development goals, track progress, and receive motivation.

request.description: Get all goals for the authenticated user. Can filter by status (active, completed, paused) to focus on current objectives.
Get detailed information about a specific goal including all progress entries and completion percentage.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Daily Meditation Practice",
  "description": "Meditate for 20 minutes every morning",
  "category": "meditation",
  "targetValue": 30,
  "currentValue": 0,
  "unit": "days",
  "deadline": "2024-12-31",
  "reminderEnabled": true,
  "reminderTime": "07:00"
}

request.description: Create a new personal goal with target metrics and optional reminders. Goals can be quantified (days, sessions, minutes) or qualitative.
Update goal information including current progress value and status. Can mark goals as completed or paused.
Delete a goal and all associated progress records.
Log progress toward a goal. Each entry increments the goal's current value and can include notes about the experience or learning.

item.name: Journals
item.description: Endpoints for personal journaling and reflection. Users can create private journal entries to track their spiritual journey and insights.

request.description: Retrieve all journal entries for the authenticated user. Returns entries in reverse chronological order by default.
Get a specific journal entry with full content and metadata.
Create a new journal entry. Entries can include tags for organization and mood tracking for emotional awareness over time.
Update an existing journal entry. Can modify content, title, tags, or mood.
Permanently delete a journal entry.

item.name: Products
item.description: Endpoints for managing spiritual products in the shop including books, courses, and merchandise. Admins can create and manage products.

request.description: Browse all available products. Can filter by category, price range, and search terms. Returns product listings with images and basic details.
Get detailed information about a specific product including full description, images, pricing, reviews, and stock availability.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "The Art of Mindfulness",
  "description": "A comprehensive guide to mindful living",
  "category": "books",
  "price": 24.99,
  "compareAtPrice": 29.99,
  "images": ["https://example.com/book-cover.jpg"],
  "inventory": 100,
  "sku": "BOOK-MIND-001",
  "isPhysical": true,
  "weight": 0.5,
  "tags": ["mindfulness", "meditation", "bestseller"]
}

request.description: Add a new product to the shop. Requires admin role. Products can be physical or digital, with inventory tracking for physical items.
Update product details including pricing, inventory, and metadata. Requires admin role.
Remove a product from the shop. Requires admin role. This does not affect past orders containing this product.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Endpoints for order management and payment processing. Users can create orders and verify payments. Admins can view all orders.

request.description: Get all orders for the authenticated user. Shows order history with status, items, and payment information.
Get detailed information about a specific order including all items, shipping details, and payment status.
Create a new order with cart items and shipping information. Returns order details and payment instructions. Validates inventory and applies coupons if provided.
Verify Razorpay payment for an order. Called after successful payment to confirm transaction and update order status.
Webhook endpoint for Razorpay payment notifications. Handles asynchronous payment events like captures, refunds, and failures. No authentication required as verification is done via signature.
View all orders across all users. Can filter by status, date range, and search by order ID or customer name. Admin only.

item.name: Quotes
item.description: Endpoints for managing daily inspirational quotes. Users get daily quotes, admins manage the quote library.

request.description: Get the inspirational quote of the day. Returns a curated quote with author information and category. Quote changes daily.
Browse all quotes in the system. Can filter by category and active status. Admin only.

body.raw:
{
  "text": "The present moment is filled with joy and happiness. If you are attentive, you will see it.",
  "author": "Thich Nhat Hanh",
  "category": "mindfulness",
  "source": "Peace Is Every Step",
  "isActive": true
}

request.description: Add a new quote to the library. Include author, source book/text, and category for organization. Admin only.
Update quote text, author, or activation status. Admin only.
Remove a quote from the library. Admin only.

item.name: Library
item.description: Endpoints for personal library management including reading progress, bookmarks, highlights, and notes. Manage your reading journey and annotations.

request.description: Get all books in user's personal library with reading progress, last read position, and completion status.
Add a book to personal library. Creates a reading progress tracker for the book.
Remove a book from library. This also deletes all associated bookmarks, highlights, and notes.
Get detailed reading progress for a specific book including current chapter, page, and completion percentage.
Update reading progress with current position. Tracks chapter, section, and percentage completion.
Retrieve all bookmarks for a specific book. Bookmarks mark important pages or passages for quick reference.

body.raw:
{
  "bookId": "book-uuid",
  "chapterId": "chapter-uuid",
  "sectionId": "section-uuid",
  "position": 1234,
  "note": "Important meditation technique"
}

request.description: Create a bookmark at the current reading position. Optionally add a note explaining why this passage is significant.
Remove a bookmark.
Get all highlighted text passages from a book. Highlights help identify key insights and memorable quotes.

body.raw:
{
  "bookId": "book-uuid",
  "chapterId": "chapter-uuid",
  "sectionId": "section-uuid",
  "selectedText": "Mindfulness is the energy of being aware and awake to the present moment.",
  "startPosition": 1234,
  "endPosition": 1310,
  "color": "yellow"
}

request.description: Highlight a text passage. Specify the exact text and position, and choose a highlight color for categorization.
Remove a highlight.
Retrieve all notes attached to a book. Notes allow for detailed reflections and personal insights.

body.raw:
{
  "bookId": "book-uuid",
  "chapterId": "chapter-uuid",
  "sectionId": "section-uuid",
  "content": "This breathing technique really resonated with me. I tried it this morning and felt more centered throughout the day.",
  "position": 1234
}

request.description: Add a note at a specific position in the book. Notes can contain detailed thoughts, questions, or personal reflections.
Update an existing note's content.
Delete a note.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Administrative endpoints for platform management including user management, coupons, notification campaigns, audit logs, and content ingestion. Admin role required.

request.description: Get overview statistics for the admin dashboard including user counts, revenue, active subscriptions, and recent activity.
List all users in the system with filtering by role and status. Includes pagination for large user bases.
Change a user's account status (active, suspended, banned). Suspended users cannot access the platform.
Modify a user's role (user, admin, super_admin). Grants or revokes administrative privileges.
List all discount coupons with their codes, discount amounts, and usage statistics.

body.raw:
{
  "code": "SUMMER2024",
  "discountType": "percentage",
  "discountValue": 25,
  "minOrderValue": 50,
  "maxUses": 100,
  "expiresAt": "2024-09-30T23:59:59Z",
  "isActive": true
}

request.description: Create a new discount coupon. Can be percentage or fixed amount. Set usage limits and expiration dates.
Update coupon settings including usage limits and activation status.
Remove a coupon from the system.
Send push notifications to users. Can target all users, specific segments, or individual users. Supports immediate or scheduled delivery.
View system audit logs tracking all administrative actions. Filter by action type, user, and date range for compliance and security monitoring.
Check the status of content ingestion for AI RAG system. Shows which books have been processed and indexed.
Process and ingest a book's content into the AI RAG system. Generates embeddings for semantic search and retrieval in AI conversations.
Regenerate embeddings for a book. Use this after updating book content or when switching embedding models.
Remove a book's embeddings from the AI search index. The book content remains but won't be used in AI responses.

item.name: Analytics
item.description: Business intelligence and analytics endpoints for tracking platform metrics, user engagement, revenue, and content performance. Admin only.

request.description: Get comprehensive dashboard analytics including user growth, engagement metrics, and revenue trends. Period can be 7d, 30d, 90d, or 1y.
Analyze user activity patterns including daily active users, session duration, feature usage, and retention rates.
Track revenue metrics including total sales, average order value, revenue by product category, and subscription MRR. Can group by day, week, or month.
Analyze workbook performance metrics including views, starts, completion rates, and average time spent. Helps identify popular content and areas for improvement.
